user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase PWM on TOM1 at 20 kHz, center-aligned, complementary high/low outputs with deadtime; update duties every 500 ms starting at 25/50/75% with +10% steps and wrap across 0–100% inclusive; keep push-pull outputs with IfxPort_PadDriver_cmosAutomotiveSpeed1; reuse existing deadtime and minPulse if known.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use GTM TOM1 channels (pairs 0/1, 2/3, 4/5) with IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl configured for center-aligned complementary PWM and deadtime. Drive period with IfxGtm_Tom_Timer at 20 kHz. Assign pins P02.0/P02.7, P02.1/P02.4, P02.2/P02.5 via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout using push-pull and IfxPort_PadDriver_cmosAutomotiveSpeed1. Schedule 500 ms duty updates using IfxStm_Timer.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Matches the user’s explicit requirement to keep TOM1 with complementary outputs and deadtime using PwmHl. The header is available in the template with real init/runtime APIs, and integrates naturally with TOM1 and the chosen pins.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3_Phase_Inverter_PWM_updateDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply new duty cycles to U/V/W complementary pairs every 500 ms with +10% steps, wrapping within 0–100% inclusive, while maintaining center-aligned complementary outputs with deadtime.

driver_changes: PWM generation remains on IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl for complementary PWM with deadtime as requested.
Add periodic scheduler using IfxStm_Timer for 500 ms duty updates.
api_changes: Pin mappings: use IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout to assign TOM1 TOUT to P02.0, P02.7, P02.1, P02.4, P02.2, P02.5 with push-pull and IfxPort_PadDriver_cmosAutomotiveSpeed1. Exact TOUT map entries must be verified in IfxGtm_PinMap.h for TC38x LFBGA292 (or 516 if that package is selected).
Periodic duty updates: schedule with IfxStm_Timer using IfxStm_Timer_setPeriod and IfxStm_Timer_run.
migration_notes.context_preserved: The plan keeps TOM1 at 20 kHz center-aligned with complementary outputs and deadtime via IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl, configures the exact requested pins on P02.*, preserves push-pull and pad driver, reuses existing deadtime/minPulse, and implements the 500 ms cyclic duty stepping as specified.

IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl.upgrade_reason: Retention decision: Stay on IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl for complementary PWM with deadtime
